title: Dabur India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Dabur India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
